name: afl++-doc
title: afl++-doc
summary: instrumentation-driven fuzzer for binary formats - documentation
description:
instrumentation-driven fuzzer for binary formats - documentation
American fuzzy lop is a fuzzer that employs compile-time instrumentation and
genetic algorithms to automatically discover clean, interesting test cases
that trigger new internal states in the targeted binary.
.
This package provides the documentation, a collection of special crafted test
cases, vulnerability samples and experimental stuff.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use afl++-doc because instrumentation-driven fuzzer for binary formats - documentation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use afl++-doc as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair afl++-doc with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `afl++-doc --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
